headline: Vaud retools economic-support toolkit against the permacrise, targeting SMEs and industry
summary: Canton of Vaud reorients its economic aid without raising budget, aiming for more targeted support of SMEs and industry.

headline: Majority of Swiss back stricter UBS capital rules in new poll, even as parliament weighs softening the Lex UBS
summary: A survey finds most Swiss support the Federal Council's tighter capital rules for UBS while parliament debates weakening them.

headline: Federal Council pledges 200M francs for Switzerland's 2038 Winter Olympics bid, without a referendum
summary: Bern officially backs the Swiss 2038 Winter Games candidacy with 200M francs, refusing to put it to a popular vote.

headline: Two Swiss digital popular initiatives push tech accountability and constitutional digital security
summary: Le Temps reviews two pending citizens' initiatives on platform liability and a constitutional digital-security article.

headline: 35C heatwave forces Geneva and Lausanne to cancel school festivities, reopens Swiss water-scarcity debate
summary: Heat warnings as 35C is passed; Geneva and Lausanne cancel school parades; SRF examines drought preparedness.

headline: AI firms reportedly buying up European antiquarian bookshops and destroying books after scanning
summary: SRF reports AI companies systematically purchasing and pulping old books from Europe; Swiss universities barely check AI plagiarism.

headline: Keir Starmer resigns as UK prime minister, opening path to Britain's 7th PM in a decade
summary: Starmer stepped down as Labour leader and PM amid Reform UK's rise; Andy Burnham is the likely successor, expected mid-July.

headline: US-Iran talks at Bürgenstock yield 60-day roadmap and US oil-sanctions waiver
summary: US Treasury issued a 60-day Iranian oil-sanctions waiver and the sides agreed a roadmap and a Lebanon de-escalation committee.

headline: Far-right lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella wins Colombia's presidential runoff by under 1%
summary: De la Espriella took 49.7% to Cepeda's 48.7% in the 2026-06-21 runoff; Trump-backed, pledges to end rebel talks and boost oil/gas.

headline: China adds 10 US firms including MP Materials and USA Rare Earth to export-control list
summary: Beijing blacklisted 10 US firms (incl. both listed US rare-earth miners) over dual-use goods, plus 46 barred from procurement, retaliating for a Pentagon entity-list expansion.

headline: Ukraine says it struck a missile-electronics plant in western Russia
summary: Kyiv reported hitting a facility producing missile electronics deep inside Russia; battle-damage unverified.

headline: Ebola cases surpass 1,000 in DR Congo amid violence and displacement
summary: The DRC Ebola outbreak passed 1,000 cases, with conflict obstructing containment.

headline: Alan Greenspan, former Federal Reserve chairman, dies at 100
summary: The long-serving Fed chair (1987-2006) has died; legacy tied to the 1990s boom and the 2008 crisis.

headline: CVE-2026-10561: unauthenticated RCE in IBM Langflow OSS scores a perfect CVSS 10.0
summary: Auth bypass plus improper Python execution isolation lets unauthenticated attackers fully compromise Langflow LLM-workflow hosts (1.0.0-1.9.3); companion CVE-2026-7664 (9.8) exposes MCP resources.

headline: MISP threat-intel platform ships coordinated batch of critical access-control fixes
summary: Multiple MISP core CVEs (CVE-2026-56422 et al., up to CVSS 9.4) fix broken authorization in controllers, bulk-deletion flows, and the Azure AD OAuth login.

headline: Grafana Snowflake datasource flaw CVE-2026-28381 allows file read/write to the Grafana host
summary: Grafana coordinated release fixes CVSS 9.6 Snowflake datasource file transfer, a Loki path traversal (7.7), and a geomap stored XSS.

headline: Angular ships multi-CVE security release across framework and VS Code Language Service
summary: Angular patches CVE-2026-54264/66/67/68 (8.2-8.8) and Language Service extension CVE-2026-49241/50178 (8.7).

headline: CVE-2026-11746: Central Dogma config server allows no-auth ZooKeeper replication mode
summary: Central Dogma before 0.84.0 permits unauthenticated replication when replication.secret is unset (CVSS 9.4); git-mirror SSH client also skips host-key verification (CVE-2026-11745).
